title: Citrusy Crispy Onion Stir-fry
description: A lazy Sunday Russian dish featuring crispy yellow onions with a touch of citrus and pickle to add a refreshing twist, served as a side or light meal.

ingredients.name: Pickled cucumber
ingredients.notes: Use light or mild pickles to minimize fodmap impact.

instructions: Slice the yellow onion thinly into rings.
Finely chop the pickled cucumber and set aside.
Mince garlic cloves and sprinkle on a plate with chili flakes if using. Set aside as well.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add sliced onions to the hot pan, cook for 5-7 minutes or until they start to soften and turn golden brown.
Add chopped pickled cucumber and minced garlic to the pan, mix evenly with onions.
Cook for an additional minute, stirring occasionally.
Adjust seasoning with salt if necessary.
